_doc: Phase 2.2 cross-language fw1a crypto golden vector. SINGLE source of truth: edit here, both Rust (tests/cross_lang_crypto.rs) and Kotlin (app/src/test/.../RelayCryptoTest.kt) load this file at runtime. Mitigates the INC-002 root cause (each side validating against itself).
_security: nonce_hex is intentionally fixed for byte-for-byte parity testing only. Production code MUST use the random-nonce APIs (encrypt_aes / RelayCrypto.encryptFw1a). The nonce-uniqueness tests below also pin this constraint.
plain_utf8: FlowWeaver fw1a cross-language test vector v1
